title: Status Limit
excerpt:
From one side the platform doesn’t allow to group by numbers for mirrored columns, only for statuses. And on the other side, they limit the statuses to 40 ! Such a idiotism. 
There is NO WAY to create unlimited groups

posts.author: Yariv (Yariv Cohen)
posts.cookedHtml:
From one side the platform doesn’t allow to group by numbers for mirrored columns, only for statuses. And on the other side, they limit the statuses to 40 ! Such a idiotism.
